  • All Purpose Curry Powder
Recipes

All Purpose Curry Powder

Chantal
29 July 2021

Ingredients


  • 25 g whole chillies
  • 10 g whole coriander
  • 1 g whole turmeric
  • 1 g whole cinnamon
  • ½ g whole cloves
  • 1 g whole black pepper
  • 1 g whole cumin

Method


To make the curry powder, roast and cool the above ingredients before grinding very fine in a coffee grinder.

currypowder recipe

Joan Wegrzyn

My Mama

As previously mentioned Mum was known for her mad cooking skills/being a feeder. It was how she showed love, she taught most of these family recipes (passed down from her Mum, Julie and other family members) at her Indian Cookery Lessons at night school and we thought that it would be a shame for the world to be deprived of these tasty meals. Here is another one of our favourites…

About


This little space on the internet is dedicated to our lovely Mama, Joan Wegrzyn, who is living her best life in Heaven now but who will always be missed down here and thought of with love.
